steps: Contact Goldman Sachs dividend department to report overpayment of USD 2,025 on GOOGL dividend (account 1901234567)
Reference US-UK tax treaty Article 10 requiring 15% withholding rate, not the 13.5% applied
Request immediate refund of excess net payment with supporting treaty documentation
If Goldman Sachs disputes, escalate with IRS treaty tables showing correct 15% rate for UK residents
